## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. Example: "I'm frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Who benefits from this feature and how they would use it.

## Mockups / Examples

<!-- If applicable, add sketches, wireframes, or links to similar implementations. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context about the feature request. -->
